title: harperocallis sessiliflora
intro: Harperocallis sessiliflora, also known as the green adder's root, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. Its health benefits include reducing swelling and pain in the body, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. Harperocallis sessiliflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
